## Checklist

- [ ] `helm lint platform-core` passes locally
- [ ] `helm template platform-core ./platform-core` renders without errors
- [ ] `values.yaml` comments updated for any new/changed options
- [ ] `Chart.yaml` version bumped appropriately
- [ ] PR title follows the pattern: `feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`, etc.
